title: Phase 7: Audit trail hardening — append-only enforcement, PHI exclusion, 7-year retention
description:
Three gaps remain per PLAN-ADJUDICLAIMS-FULL-BUILD.md §7.1:
1. Append-only enforcement verification — confirm no UPDATE/DELETE paths exist on AuditEvent rows; add DB-level constraint or test coverage proving it
2. PHI exclusion verification — confirm audit log entries never contain PHI fields (claimant name, SSN, DOB, medical content); enforce via middleware + tests
3. 7-year retention configuration — implement data-retention.service.ts schedule or cron that marks AuditEvent rows for deletion after 7 years (LC 4903.05 / HIPAA §164.530(j))
acceptance_criteria: No UPDATE or DELETE paths exist on AuditEvent rows — enforced at DB level or verified by tests
Audit log entries never contain PHI fields (claimant name, SSN, DOB, medical content) — enforced via middleware + tests
7-year retention schedule marks AuditEvent rows for deletion after 7 years (LC 4903.05 / HIPAA §164.530(j))
All 3,068 existing tests continue to pass
New tests added for all three gap areas
